narrative:
Newark Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,500 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
